This is a visual preview only — no production code has been changed. Hover any label to see its field name and coordinate. Approve this layout and changes will be applied; otherwise note what to adjust.

NEW — field does not exist yet, will be added
REMOVED — currently wrong page / wrong position
MOVED — same field, adjusted position
UNCHANGED — keeping current coordinate (verify alignment)
